temporal_description:
(00:00-00:02) A close-up shot shows a man in a dark shirt inside a car, his face sweaty and his expression filled with anguish and fear. He looks off-screen as he speaks, his mouth slightly open. The scene is dark and tense. (Storyline: The scene opens on a moment of high emotional intensity, establishing a character in a state of distress or fear as he recounts a past event.) (Audio: 1) Tone of speech: Distressed, pained. 2) Background sounds or music: A low, tense musical score begins to build.)
(00:03-00:07) The scene abruptly cuts to a low-angle, wide shot of a dark-colored car, license plate '2087', crashing violently. The car is tilted precariously over a dirt embankment, with smoke billowing from it as it scrapes against the ground. (Storyline: This flashback or cutaway sequence depicts a traumatic event, likely a car crash, which is being recounted by the character in the previous scene. The violence of the crash contrasts with the quiet distress of the man.) (Audio: 1) Tone of speech: N/A. 2) Background sounds or music: The sound of the car crash, including screeching tires, metal crunching, and a loud thud, dominates the audio. The tense music continues.)
